creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have added ClamFS to the WantedPorts page of the FreeBSD Wiki [1]

Please note that while feedback is welcome and encouraged, the FreeBSD Project cannot address generic support requests.

FreeBSD relies primarily on users and the community proposing and providing contributions to solutions that improve the quality and utility of the ecosystem.

[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/action/info/WantedPorts?action=diff&rev2=288&rev1=287
